ADDED (eventsAdded: 1): EM friidrett 2026 (European Athletics Championships), Alexander Stadium Birmingham, 10-16 August. Surfaced by the late-additions scout, then INDEPENDENTLY fact-checked (fresh context): dates/venue confirmed (standalone 27th edition, NOT the multi-sport European Championships) via Wikipedia + official Birmingham 2026 timetable; NRK confirmed as the Norwegian rights holder (holds outdoor European Athletics 2026/2028/2030) directly on nrk.no; day 1 morning session ~10:30 BST (09:30 UTC), evening ~19:00 BST. high confidence (3 evidence URLs). norwegianPlayers left empty (start lists unpublished); Warholm (reigning European 400mH champion), the Ingebrigtsen brothers and decathletes Skotheim/Rooth are expected but not yet confirmed — disclosed in the summary. Fills a real coverage gap ~5 weeks out, just beyond the coverage-critic's 4-week horizon; added now to pre-empt a future recall miss. importance:4 (accent dot).

NOT added: European Aquatics Championships Paris (31 July-16 Aug) — no confirmed Norwegian relevance (Norway is not a swimming nation) and streaming unverified; omitted for a calm board (no guessing).

Chess: no new July/early-Aug tournament for Carlsen (search noise conflates the Feb 2026 Freestyle World Championship he won and the 2025 Las Vegas leg — neither is a July/Aug 2026 event); next confirmed remains Esports World Cup chess (11-15 Aug, on board). No new Aryan Tari event (withdrew from Sjakk-NM elite).
